name: FctsCaseMgtCostExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT DISTINCT CMCM_ID, CMCS_SEQ_NO, CMCS_INPUT_DT, CMCS_FROM_DT, CMCS_TO_DT, CMCS_ACT_COST, CMCS_PROJ_COST, CMCS_INPUT_USID, CMCS_MCTR_COST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_CMCS_COST_LOG WHERE CMCS_INPUT_DT >= '@{pipeline().parameters.LastRunDt}') SELECT STRIP.FIELD.EE(cte.CMCM_ID) + ';' + CAST(cte.CMCS_SEQ_NO AS VARCHAR(20)) + ';' + dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS PRI_NAT_KEY_STRING, '@{pipeline().parameters.RunIDTimeStamp}' AS FIRST_RECYC_TS, STRIP.FIELD.EE(cte.CMCM_ID) AS CASE_MGT_ID, cte.CMCS_SEQ_NO AS CST_SEQ_NO, dbo.trim_default(@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCd}) AS SRC_SYS_CD, STRIP.FIELD.EE(dbo.trim_default(cte.CMCS_INPUT_USID)) AS CST_INPT_USER_ID, cte.CMCS_INPUT_DT AS CST_INPT_DT, cte.CMCS_FROM_DT AS FROM_DT, cte.CMCS_TO_DT AS TO_DT, cte.CMCS_ACT_COST AS ACTL_CST_AMT, cte.CMCS_PROJ_COST AS PROJ_CST_AMT, TrimLeadingTrailing(StripWhiteSpace(cte.CMCS_MCTR_COST)) AS CMCS_MCTR_COST FROM cte

Description:
Called By: FctsMedMgtCntl


Process : Extract Case Mgt Status data from Facets to DataSet which is processed and loaded to CASE_MGT_CST_LOG  table
